reasoning: Initial observation suggests that the absorbance is directly related to molar absorptivity, concentration, and path length. To confirm this relationship, I will increase the molar absorptivity and observe the change in absorbance.

The absorbance increased proportionally when the molar absorptivity was doubled, suggesting a linear relationship. Next, I will increase the concentration to see if the absorbance also increases proportionally.
The absorbance has increased proportionally with both molar absorptivity and concentration. Next, I will increase the path length to confirm its effect on absorbance.

The absorbance has doubled when the path length was doubled, indicating a linear relationship. Given the proportional changes in absorbance with respect to molar absorptivity, concentration, and path length, we can conclude the Beer-Lambert law applies here.
